name: Paw Performance Polo-Large Women Blue
description: Paw Print Polo Shirt – For Women Who Wear Their Love for Pets Proudly Chic, comfortable, and full of heart — our Women’s Paw Print Polo Shirt is designed for cat and dog lovers who want to show their pet pride in effortless style. With a feminine fit and a sweet embroidered paw detail, this polo is perfect for everyday wear with a meaningful touch. Product Highlights: Material: Soft and breathable cotton-poly blend for lasting comfort and a flattering drape Design: Delicate embroidered paw print combining both cat and dog motifs — a subtle yet heartfelt tribute to your furry friends Fit: Tailored women’s fit with a shaped silhouette, capped sleeves, and a neat two-button placket for a polished, feminine look Versatility: Ideal for casual outings, pet events, or relaxed weekends — stylish and easy to pair with jeans or leggings Care Instructions: Machine washable for easy care and long-lasting quality Whether you're out with your pup, lounging with your cat, or gifting a fellow pet lover, this polo shirt is your go-to for combining comfort, charm, and your love for animals. Make your everyday look purr-fect — order your Women’s Paw Print Polo Shirt today!
